systems.purpose: Diagnose Home23 host, PM2, ports, logs, and scoped service issues without destructive global operations.

freshness.purpose: Verify whether Home23 data, metrics, snapshots, receipts, and source files are current enough to trust.

memory.purpose: Audit memory for stale beliefs, duplicate loops, missing resolution receipts, and current-state anchors.

parity.purpose: Compare Home23 surfaces and client contracts, then produce portable native/web parity instructions.

release.purpose: Run portable release readiness checks, version/build preflight, changelog, and upload verification guidance.

feeder.purpose: Inspect document ingestion, watch paths, compiler queues, quarantines, converter health, and freshness.
